case_title: SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT VS. YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-27-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST FRANK P. AGNOST, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-27-2005 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-11-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: BELDON YEE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-27-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-15-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-27-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT , A UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.
